calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kathleen Wright for William Dillingham (Trustee). Benjamin Gale for and with Mary Fahey (Beneficiary).

The Court informed Counsel that the only thing it could do is to confirm that the Trustee has the power to sell the insurance agency. The Parties presented oral argument in support of their request to have the Court approve the purchase/sales agreement. The Petition for Instructions was continued to March 25, 2014 at 10:30 a.m. (special set), in Dept. 204 for status of the petition. The Court encouraged Counsel to work things out.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Continued To Feb-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
